free_text: Energy dependence of the optical potential of the
weakly bound 9Be projectile on the 197Au target
Inst. de Fisica de Rosario (CONICET-UNR),
Rosario; Ingenieria y Agrimensura (UNR), Rosario
20UD tandem accelerator
Self-supporting Au foil (250 ug/cm2 thick)
An array of eight Si surface-barrier detectors
Two Si monitor detectors at +16 deg and -16 deg
where the scattering is pure Rutherford.
Uncertainty due to counting statistics and
solid angle determination
Incident energies are corrected for the target
thickness, and represent those at the middle of the
target.
Data received from Andres Arazi.
Approved by A.Arazi (2020-05-16,2020-08-28)
